entity: BBR source abbreviation WSB maps to warehouse canonical WAS (Washington Bullets era, 1974)

query_target.sql: SELECT team_id, abbreviation, full_name, city, state, arena, year_founded FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612764' AND abbreviation = 'WAS' AND full_name = 'Washington Bullets'

notes: WSB is the BBR source abbreviation for the Washington Bullets (1973-97 before the Wizards rename). dim_team has the historical 'Washington Bullets' row with abbreviation WAS from 1974. The franchise later became the Wizards (1997+), also stored as WAS.
